verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will give praise to You Exalt Your holy name For You have done great things I know You never change Your glorious presence is all my spirit ever needs Let all the world depart Just stay close to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O Lord, my God Won't You look into my open heart I can never ever hide from You You know me so well You know my life Take all of me I commit my very soul to You And may everything I say and do Glorify Your name.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I am by myself I long to worship You You know my heart's desire To know Your perfect will Lord, let me lift Your name Not only with the song I sing but with the very life I received from You
